title: eranthis iranica
intro: Eranthis iranica, also known as the Iranian winter aconite, is a flowering plant species in the Ranunculaceae family. It is a perennial plant that grows in the mountainous regions of Iran and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Eranthis iranica is typically used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
